theme_notes: World Cup Day 1 results in (Mexico 2-0 South Africa, South Korea 2-1 Czechia); Trump's US-Iran peace deal declared 'days away' with the Strait of Hormuz set to reopen; South Korea's ousted president Yoon Suk Yeol sentenced to 30 years; David Beckham gets his Hollywood Walk of Fame star with Tom Cruise in attendance.
settled: Balanced. Yoon Suk Yeol is doing 30 years. You two are even. Relatively.
Zero balance. Beckham got a Hollywood star. You got closure. Same energy.
All square. The Iran deal isn't signed yet. This one is. You win.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup stadium snack. Eaten. Gone. This lingers.
South Africa scored zero in their World Cup opener. You're in their tier.
Trump says the Iran deal is 'days away.' Your Venmo is further.
World Cup jersey money. It would at least have a name on the back.
Yoon Suk Yeol got 30 years. You've had this for three weeks. Same look.
The Strait of Hormuz is reopening. Your wallet remains closed for diplomacy.
Group-stage seat prices. You're on the couch. With this balance and a snack.
Beckham's ceremony cost less. Tom Cruise showed up for him.
Iran says the final text is done. You still haven't opened the app.
Mexico City and nosebleed seats. Or this debt. You chose the debt.
Yoon launched drones over Pyongyang to justify martial law. What's your excuse?
Trump declared the ceasefire permanent. Your partner hasn't.
World Cup VIP access. For someone. Not you. Not at this balance.
Beckham had a crowd, flowers, and Tom Cruise. You have this number.
Ukraine's drones operate on stricter budgets with better delivery rates.
FIFA built stadiums in three countries for less drama than your payment history.
Yoon gets 30 years. Your partner gets 30 years of this conversation.
The Strait of Hormuz has been more open than your wallet. And it was CLOSED.
theyOwe: South Africa: zero goals, zero dignity. Your partner owes almost as much.
They owe you less than a Beckham ceremony selfie. Collect anyway.
The Iran deal is days away. This repayment is also, apparently, 'days away'.
World Cup group-stage seat. They're in it. You're funding it.
Yoon's lawyers billed this per hour. They still lost. You haven't yet.
The Strait reopens this week. Your partner's Venmo remains closed.
Enough for a World Cup jersey with your name on the back. Bill them for it.
Tom Cruise showed up for Beckham. Where's your red-carpet repayment moment?
Iran's foreign minister said the text is finalized. Your partner said 'soon'.
South Korea imprisoned a sitting president today. Use that energy.
World Cup knockout ticket territory. You've been knocked out. Time to score.
The ceasefire is permanent. Your patience has hit its own 30-year limit.
Return flights to the World Cup final. They'll be there. On your invoice.
Yoon had 30 years to consider his choices. Your partner is still considering.
Ukraine funds precision drones for less. With cleaner results.
FIFA opened the whole World Cup today. Your partner can't open a payment app.
Beckham cried at the Walk of Fame. Valid. You'll cry at the bank app. Also valid.
The Hormuz blockade lasted months. Your missing money has been missing longer.
